# Somo Smart - AI-Powered Learning Platform

> Somo Smart is a Kenyan learning platform for learners, teachers, and parents.

## Core Product Areas

- Learner dashboard: https://www.somaai.co.ke/learner
- Teacher workspace: https://www.somaai.co.ke/teacher
- Parent portal: https://www.somaai.co.ke/parent
- School dashboard: https://www.somaai.co.ke/school
- Revision portal: https://www.somaai.co.ke/revision
- Pricing: https://www.somaai.co.ke/pricing
- Blog: https://www.somaai.co.ke/blog

## What Learners Get

- Ask Akili explanations
- Quiz generation and marking
- Notes and past papers library access
- Guided revision by curriculum level

## What Teachers Get

- Lesson and assessment generation
- Classroom stream and assignment flows
- Marking support and report-ready outputs
- Monetizable teacher-created premium resources

## Library Policy

- Official/admin uploaded notes and past papers are available to subscribed learners.
- Paid gates should apply to teacher-created premium resources only.

## Audience

- Learners preparing for KCSE, KPSEA, and CBC assessments
- Teachers in Kenyan primary and secondary schools
- Parents monitoring learner outcomes

## Contact

- Website: https://www.somaai.co.ke/
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya

## Search Guides

- Kenyan AI tutor: https://www.somaai.co.ke/ai-tutor-kenya
- KCSE past-paper practice: https://www.somaai.co.ke/kcse-past-papers
- KPSEA past-paper practice: https://www.somaai.co.ke/kpsea-past-papers
- CBC notes library: https://www.somaai.co.ke/cbc-notes-kenya
- Lesson planning for teachers: https://www.somaai.co.ke/lesson-plan-generator-kenya
- Schemes and syllabus tracking: https://www.somaai.co.ke/schemes-of-work-generator-kenya
